segments.beat: hand holds device at angle, clear shell and PCB internals visible, display off
device rotated to show side profile and edge; display glows faint blue, internals in view
device laid flat face-up, display active with blue pixel content, PCB and flex ribbon visible through shell
device angled forward, display showing game/text content in blue on transparent pane, clear resin body prominent
device tilted near vertical then flipped; display content and internal flex cable and board visible through clear shell
device flat face-up with display lit white/bright, clear shell catches light; transition to display off / blank white
device repositioned on flat surface, display active with blue content, transparent shell and PCB clearly visible from above
held at slight angle, display active, stable close-up of front face showing transparent shell and lit display

demonstrates.motion_value: high — device rotated through multiple axes continuously exposing PCB, flex ribbon, and internal components through clear resin shell
high — display cycles through off, dim blue glow, active blue pixel content, and bright white; transparency of display pane visible against internals
medium — clear resin finish catches light, flex cable and PCB layout visible, premium tactile impression conveyed through close handling
low — hand in frame at 0:00–0:01 gives size reference; no deliberate pocket demo
low — flat-surface placement and steady close-up framing implies display/showcase context

selection_note: Strong continuous rotation reveals both load-bearing claims (transparent shell + active see-through display) in a single uncut take; best pull for feature callout or side-by-side transparency hero.

aesthetics.weakness: prototype PCB guts fully exposed throughout - reads as unfinished hardware
aesthetics.note: handheld rotation on bare wood desk with exposed flex cables; no intentional shot design
